# Second Act Labs

> Independent software studio. Tools built to solve real problems. No team. No runway. Just shipping.

## Products

### GenCatalog
Local AI image and video organizer for Grok Imagine, Higgsfield, and Digen. Captures prompts, metadata, and media automatically. $39 one-time.
[gencatalog.app](https://gencatalog.app)

### ClawSentinel
macOS menu bar utility that monitors the OpenClaw AI gateway. Auto-recovers crashes, detects memory leaks, alerts on token limits. $7.99 one-time.
[clawsentinel.app](https://clawsentinel.app)

## About

Second Act Labs is an independent software studio building tools for the AI era. Anonymous founder, shipping in public.

- [Website](https://secondactlabs.com)
